name: 영문 에세이 5p 비교 (화요일 시작, 금요일 마감)

conversation.user: I have a 5-page essay due Friday for my English class. Topic is comparing two novels we read. I haven't started. It's Tuesday now.

expectedAI.mustAsk: Have you already read both novels?
expectedAI.reason: 소설 미독 시 Day 0 리뷰 단계 추가 필요 → 일정 구조 변경
mustDiagnose: essay uses milestone-based plan, not page-based
mustNotDo: plan 바로 생성 (소설 읽음 여부 모름)

conversation.user: Yeah I've read both. Just haven't started writing.

expectedAI.diagnosis: 3 working days (Tue/Wed/Thu); novels already read → no extra reading day needed; milestone-based planning
expectedAI.strategy: Day 1 (Tue): outline + thesis + intro + body paragraph 1 — 60min; Day 2 (Wed): remaining body paragraphs + conclusion — 60-75min; Day 3 (Thu): revision + read-aloud + rubric check + submit prep — 45-60min
expectedAI.honestAssessment: 3 days is enough for a 5-page essay if you start writing (not just outlining) on Day 1.

alternatives.label: 소설 미독 시
alternatives.change: Day 0 추가: 핵심 장면 리뷰 후 outline 시작

mustIdentify: Day 1 must include real writing, not just outline

turn1MustAsk: Have you already read both novels?

emotion.toneExpected: structured, reassuring, actionable milestone-by-milestone; thesis checkpoint at Day 1 end
